incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols on first attempt

steps.text: Check the table. How many sightings does Rabbits have? Each symbol stands for 2.

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols on second attempt

steps.text: Let's think about this together. Rabbits has 8 sightings. Each symbol equals 2, so 8 divided by 2 equals 4 symbols.

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols three or more times — system models the answer

params.description: System places 4 symbols in Rabbits row one at a time

steps.text: This is tricky, so let me show you. Rabbits has 8 sightings. Each symbol equals 2. I count: 2, 4, 6, 8 — that's 4 symbols. 8 is even, so no half-symbol needed.
